fields.explainZh: 代理池中当前处于活动状态并被分配给应用程序的代理数。
fields.explainEn: Number of active agents assigned to applications in the agent pool.

fields.explainZh: 代理池中活动代理数所占的比例。
fields.explainEn: Ratio of active agents in the agent pool.

fields.explainZh: 代理池中当前未分配给任何应用程序的代理数。
fields.explainEn: Number of agents not assigned to any application in the agent pool.

fields.explainZh: 活动代理数与空闲代理数的总和。
fields.explainEn: Total number of registered agents and idle agents.

fields.explainZh: 正在等待标记的代理进程。
fields.explainEn: Number of agents waiting to be identified.
Buffer Statistics Logo.
Name of the buffer pool.

fields.explainZh: 数据库管理器为响应页面请求而从缓冲池加载请求页的百分比。
fields.explainEn: Percentage of loading the requested pages from the buffer pool.

fields.explainZh: 数据库管理器访问缓冲池中存在的数据页的百分比。
fields.explainEn: Percentage of accessing data pages from the buffer pool.
Name of the database.

fields.explainZh: 不使用缓冲池的读次数。
fields.explainEn: Number of reads without using the buffer pool.

fields.explainZh: 不使用缓冲池的写次数。
fields.explainEn: Number of writes without using the buffer pool.

fields.explainZh: 数据库管理器访问缓冲池中存在的检索页的百分比。
fields.explainEn: Percentage of accessing index pages from the buffer pool.
Size of the default application heap.
Size of the database code page.
Character set of the DB2 application.
Size of the database memory threshold.

fields.nameZh: 缺省表空间扩展数据块
fields.explainZh: 缺省表空间扩展数据块大小。
fields.explainEn: Size of the default tablespace extent.

fields.explainZh: 锁超时的时间，如果为-1表示永不超时。
fields.explainEn: Time period before the lock times out. The value -1 indicates that the lock never times out.

fields.explainZh: DB2数据库当前的日志模式。
fields.explainEn: Two modes, Circular and Archival, are available.
Number of database backups to retain.
Size of the database page.

fields.explainZh: 本地连接与远程连接总数。
fields.explainEn: Total number of local connections and remote connections.

fields.explainZh: 当前连接总数与最大连接数大小的比例。
fields.explainEn: Ratio of the current number of connections to the maximum number of connections.

fields.explainZh: 本地连接到DB2服务器的连接数。
fields.explainEn: Number of local connections to the DB2 server.
Maximum number of connections to the database.
Number of remote connections to the DB2 server.

fields.explainZh: 数据库开始连接的时间。
fields.explainEn: Connection start time of the database.
Database alias.
Name of the database.
Path that stores the database.
Database status.
Number of deadlocks.

fields.explainZh: 日志使用占总空间的百分比。
fields.explainEn: Percentage of logs to the total space.
Percentage of sort overflows.
Time when the current DB2 connection is established.
Service State of the application.
The information of DB2 Application version.
Number of lock upgrades for the database.

fields.explainZh: 数据库等待锁的连接数。
fields.explainEn: Number of connections waiting for lock releasing for the database.

fields.explainZh: 恢复日志文件（仅当需要时）而创建和使用的辅助日志文件的数量。
fields.explainEn: The number of second log files created and used to restore log files (only when needed).
Size of the application memory.
Size of the buffer pool.

fields.explainZh: 目录高速缓存大小,如果为-4KB，则表示当前数据库环境此值为缺省值-1，请检查数据库配置。
fields.explainEn: Size of the catalog cache,If it is -4KB, it means the current database environment, this value is the default value -1, please check the database configuration.
Size of the database heap.
Size of the log buffer.

fields.explainZh: 程序包高速缓存大小，如果为-4KB，则表示当前数据库环境此值为缺省值-1，请检查数据库配置。
fields.explainEn: Size of the package cache,If it is -4KB, it means the current database environment, this value is the default value -1, please check the database configuration.
Size of the sort list heap.
Size of the statistics heap.
Size of the SQL statement heap.
Size of the utilities heap.

fields.explainZh: 连接到DB2数据库所需的时间。
fields.explainEn: Time used for connecting to the DB2 database.
Number of free bytes in the tablespace.
Percentage of free bytes to allocated bytes.

fields.nameZh: 最大可扩展表空间大小
fields.explainZh: 理论上最大可扩展表空间大小。
fields.explainEn: Theoretical maximum extent size of the tablespace.

fields.explainZh: 当前表空间利用大小与最大可扩展表空间大小的比例。
fields.explainEn: Ratio of the used size of the tablespace to the maximum extent size of the tablespace.

fields.explainZh: 表空间是否自动扩展，ON表示是，OFF表示否。
fields.explainEn: Whether the tablespace is automatically expanded. The values are ON and OFF.
State of the tablespace.
Size of the tablespace.
Type of the tablespace.

fields.explainZh: 表空间已使用的大小与表空间总大小的比率。
fields.explainEn: Percentage of tablespace to the total space.

fields.explainZh: 用于计算利用率的转换值。
fields.explainEn: The conversion value used to calculate utilization.
Number of bytes allocated to the tablespace.
Tablespace name.

fields.explainZh: 测试IP对应资源的协议连接。
fields.explainEn: Test the protocol connections of the resource corresponding to an IP address.
